title: Clear Large Cone Cellophane Bags (18cm x 45cm) Pack of 25 - Transparent Gift Packaging Bags for Parties, Weddings, and Special Occasions
seller_info_text: The Party Store Girl / Special Memories
features: LARGE & VERSATILE: Clear large cone cellophane bags measure 18cm x 45cm, perfect for accommodating various sizes of gifts & party favors, making them suitable for all your special occasions like weddings, birthdays, and holiday gatherings.

CLEAR & ELEGANT: Our transparent cellophane bags showcase the contents beautifully while providing a sleek and professional finish – impress your guests, customers, or recipients with your thoughtfully presented gifts or merchandise.

PACK OF 25: This bulk package includes 25 clear cone bags, ensuring you have enough bags to cover multiple events or to provide premium gift packaging for your entire party, business, or personal gifting needs.

IDEAL FOR ANY OCCASIONS: These multipurpose cellophane bags are perfect for creating charming gift baskets, presenting party favors, displaying sweets and treats, or offering elegant samples during product launches – the possibilities are endless.

EASY TO SEAL & CUSTOMIZE: Complement your gift or package with personalized ribbons, bows, or stickers, and secure the content effortlessly by tying or sealing with ease – focusing on presentation has never been simpler.
